# awesome-ai-api (full dump for LLMs)

> Full, machine-readable leaderboard of AI API gateways, formatted for LLM ingestion.
> Snapshot: 2026-04-26 12:59 SGT. Total: 203. API-confirmed: 101.
> Canonical site: https://mackding.github.io/awesome-ai-api/
> Source repo: https://github.com/MackDing/awesome-ai-api
> License: MIT (code) + CC0 (data)

## Top 50 Gateways (sorted by score)

1. Avian — https://avian.io — score 9.9, API verified, region global, engine unknown, latency 127ms, uptime 100.0% over 4 samples, models: claude, gpt, anthropic, openai, deepseek, llama
2. OneToken — https://onetoken.one — score 9.9, API verified, region cn, engine new-api, latency 250ms, uptime 100.0% over 4 samples, models: claude, gpt, gemini, chatgpt, openai, deepseek
